title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 241.309 - Counties may sell land, how — proceeds, how used
text:
241.309.  Counties may sell land, how — proceeds, how used. — All counties in which such islands are situated may, subject to the provisions of section 241.311, cause them to be appropriately surveyed and sell and convey them in the same manner as lands are sold under the provisions of section 241.310, and for the same purposes.
(L. 1971 H.B. 140 § 3)
